title: Economy+
description: The Economy Plugin improved by Furiusfighter213
body:
**Economy+**

A professional, production-ready Vault economy plugin for Minecraft 1.21+

** Features**
- Full Vault Economy integration
- SQLite & MySQL support with async operations
- UUID-based player accounts
- Configurable currency, limits, and taxes
- Transaction logging for large transfers
- Complete admin command suite
- Developer-friendly API

** Requirements**
- Minecraft 1.21+
- Java 21
- Vault (optional but recommended)
- Paper, Spigot, or Purpur server

** Commands**
- /money - Check balance
- /pay - Send money
- /baltop - Leaderboard
- /eco - Admin commands
- and mind 8 more Commands

** Permissions**
- economyplus.balance - Check own balance
- economyplus.pay - Pay other players
- economyplus.baltop - View leaderboard
- economyplus.admin - Admin commands
